data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no
,( select nvl(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '01' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as insurance_amount /*ค่าประกันอัคคีภัย*/
,( select nvl(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '02' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as loan_amount /*ค่าประกันสินเชื่อ*/
,( select nvl(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '03' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as app_land_amount /*ค่าประเมินที่ดิน*/
,( select nvl(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '04','05','06' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as cks_amount /*หักเงิน ชคส*/
,( select nvl(sum( amount ),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type in ( '07' ) and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no
) as crem_amount /*หักเงิน สมาคมฌาปนกิจ*/
, FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) as loan_type , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type )) as loan_type_description ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd month')||' '||'พ.ศ.'||to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'yyyy') as thia_begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as principal_amount
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as interest_amount
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '1' ) /*WHERE*/ and 1=2 --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '22/04/2020' order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
